rarely a false positive; watch for "however small" (adverbial not discourse)

subordinating; may introduce weak concession rather than genuine reframe

almost always discourse contrast; low FP rate

rare in transcripts; low FP when present

deference hedge vs genuine epistemic uncertainty; extremely common in spoken language

low FP; almost always epistemic
low FP; watch for "probably the best" (superlative minimiser not hedge)
perceptual/epistemic hedge; the bigram "seems like" missed "it seems" and "seems to be"; watch for "seems like a good idea" (social softener)
